channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ DESTROY BOYS, I KILLED THE PROM QUEEN, MOUTH CULTURE, SLEEP THEORY & MORE ADDED TO ROCK FOR PEOPLE 2026 LINE-UP IN THE CZECH REPUBLIC ☠⚡
item.description:
🤘🚀 HELLFIRE & CRYPTO CHAOS, METALHEADS! 🤘🚀
Grab your axes and wallets 'cause we're diving into the raging whirlwind that is Rock For People 2026, and it’s about to get WILD in the Czech Republic! 🤘🔥
Join me in the mosh pit of over 130 BLAZING hot acts ready to shred your soul into pixelated pieces from June 10th to June 14th, 2026! 🎸😈 We've got the DESTROY BOYS tearing down the walls, I KILLED THE PROM QUEEN unleashing chaos like they’ve got something to prove, and MOUTH CULTURE spitting fire that'll leave your brain scorched. And don't you dare sleep on SLEEP THEORY—they're gonna slap you awake with riffs that are truly out of this world! 🔥👊
This isn’t just a fest—it’s a FREAKING METAL MARCH into the unknown, blending our love for heavy music and digital gold like a shot of adrenaline straight to the heart! Get your neck ready for headbanging, ’cause we’re merging the heavy with the crypto, and you know we’re riding this wave to the top! 👽💰
So, whether you’re here to jam or make it rain in the blockchain, let’s turn up the volume and embrace the chaos because Rock For People is your one-way ticket to an epic sound explosion! See you in the pit, you beautiful freaks! 🤘💀✨
Stay lethal, stay crypto, 🎤💣 and rock on!
Catch all the electrifying details [here](https://metalinjection.net/tour-dates/festivals/destroy-boys-i-killed-the-prom-queen-mouth-culture-sleep-theory-more-added-to-rock-for-people-2026-line-up-in-the-czech-republic)! 🔗💀
#ThrashMetal #MetalCommunity #DeathMetal #MetalScene #Headbangers
item.content:encoded:
🤘🚀 HELLFIRE & CRYPTO CHAOS, METALHEADS! 🤘🚀
Grab your axes and wallets 'cause we're diving into the raging whirlwind that is Rock For People 2026, and it’s about to get WILD in the Czech Republic! 🤘🔥
Join me in the mosh pit of over 130 BLAZING hot acts ready to shred your soul into pixelated pieces from June 10th to June 14th, 2026! 🎸😈 We've got the DESTROY BOYS tearing down the walls, I KILLED THE PROM QUEEN unleashing chaos like they’ve got something to prove, and MOUTH CULTURE spitting fire that'll leave your brain scorched. And don't you dare sleep on SLEEP THEORY—they're gonna slap you awake with riffs that are truly out of this world! 🔥👊
This isn’t just a fest—it’s a FREAKING METAL MARCH into the unknown, blending our love for heavy music and digital gold like a shot of adrenaline straight to the heart! Get your neck ready for headbanging, ’cause we’re merging the heavy with the crypto, and you know we’re riding this wave to the top! 👽💰
So, whether you’re here to jam or make it rain in the blockchain, let’s turn up the volume and embrace the chaos because Rock For People is your one-way ticket to an epic sound explosion! See you in the pit, you beautiful freaks! 🤘💀✨
Stay lethal, stay crypto, 🎤💣 and rock on!
Catch all the electrifying details [here](https://metalinjection.net/tour-dates/festivals/destroy-boys-i-killed-the-prom-queen-mouth-culture-sleep-theory-more-added-to-rock-for-people-2026-line-up-in-the-czech-republic)! 🔗💀
#ThrashMetal #MetalCommunity #DeathMetal #MetalScene #Headbangers
